condition: low PBR, value-up index inclusion, buyback expectation, stablecoin bill, IPO expectation, or exchange-stake rumor only
example: Value-up policy headline or KRW stablecoin theme without company-level execution.

condition: actual cancellation, dividend increase, stable CET1/K-ICS, stake acquisition, stablecoin circulation/reserve income, or IPO valuation filing
example: SK Square cancellation plan, Hana-Dunamu stake, Circle USDC circulation/reserve income, or Commercial Act treasury mandate.

condition: ROE/PBR band change, repeated returns, credit-cost stability, FCF/capital ratio durability, regulated revenue model, and price-path alignment
example: Circle can be Stage 2~3 candidate only with reserve/redemption/revenue proof and 4B/regulatory-economics watch.

condition: Korea value-up, stablecoin infrastructure, digital-asset exchange exposure, or capital-return expectation is broadly accepted and priced first
example: Circle trades more than 3x IPO price or value-up PBR bands already rerate before execution.

condition: PF credit-cost spike, activist rejection, buyback cancel with business failure, IPO valuation cut, exchange hack, de-peg/reserve failure, or tax shock
example: Samsung C&T activist rejection, Clear Street IPO cut, Bybit hack, TerraUSD/Luna collapse, or BoE reserve-rule margin squeeze.
